Aware · Protect · Advocate

Protect Your
Digital Footprint.

Most people do not understand or actively manage their digital footprint, leaving them vulnerable to privacy, security, and legal risks. Cipher & Counsel was built to change that.

Start Here Meet the Founder
Why It Matters

Your data is worth
more than you think.

Global threat landscapes evolve constantly. Cybersecurity attacks target individuals, organizations, and governments simultaneously — and your digital footprint is part of that picture whether you manage it or not.

The tools to protect yourself exist. The knowledge to use them should be free.

Start Here Protect Yourself
Our Framework

A clear approach to cybersecurity

Understanding cybersecurity does not require a technical background. It requires awareness, deliberate habits, and the willingness to lead.

Aware
Understand your digital footprint — what you share, what is collected, and where your data exists.

Mission

Built for the people
who need it most.

Cybersecurity affects every person who uses the internet — regardless of technical background. The knowledge, tools, and community to protect yourself should be equally accessible.

"To educate and empower individuals with the knowledge and tools to navigate the digital world safely and responsibly."

What you don't know
can hurt you.

Data collection does not stop when you stop scrolling. Your digital footprint is being built, bought, and sold whether you manage it or not.
